scripts.qa:contract: npm run validate:machine-docs && npm run validate:domain-schemas && npm run build:coverage && npm run build:dependency-graph
scripts.qa:ai-review: node scripts/ai-ui-review.mjs --config docs/machine/ai-review.v1.yaml --schema schemas/ai-ui-review-result.schema.json --artifacts test-results/ai-artifacts --out test-results/ai-reviews
scripts.qa:gate: npm run qa:contract && npm run qa:smoke && npm run qa:ai-review
scripts.qa:gate:strict: npm run qa:contract && npm run qa:smoke && npm run qa:ai-review -- --strict
